since_last: 65% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.76%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.04% · BTC +0.92% · Gold -0.06% · Nasdaq100 +0.42%. 65% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.76%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.76%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.01%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +4.82%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +4.82%, MRVL +4.54%, MDB +4.40%, TER +4.37%, PUBM +4.01%. Laggards: CRNC -2.67%, ORCL -2.65%, TSLA -2.56%, TLN -2.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.57% at $122.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.57% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
